subject: Updated CSIT to reflect newly added version validation
commit_message:

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Chenfei - please work with Bilal on this. Because ALL the CSITs fail, there needs to be ONE review that has ALL the fixes contained in that review.

This will fail until Bilal is finished working with the integration team and LF to get JDK 11 in the job runner, as well as until apex/engine/distribution are upgraded.
